Weaving Communication,
Design & Development

Rooted in the Latin word texo — “to weave, to build, to construct”.

Welcome to my digital basecamp where I document my craft in accessibility, design and front-end development.

FEATURED

Weaving Stories and Programs for Community Impact

Transformed Toronto City Mission’s digital presence by crafting impactful stories and strategic landing pages that showcased programs for children and youth.

Using Props in React

How to pass data, receive props and map components with an example of a personal travel journal.

Formulas and Screen readers

Optimizing screen-reading technologies for formulas featured in PDF documents.

Creating Accessible Tables

How to create accessible tables in PDF documents for screen reading technologies.
